title: Guendalina
writer: Valerio Zurlini, Leonardo Benvenuti, Piero De Bernardi
actors: Jacqueline Sassard, Raf Mattioli, Sylva Koscina
plot: A teenage girl vacations in the Italian Riviera during the summer with her wealthy parents; as her parents bicker and contemplate divorce, the young girl finds love in the arms of a handsome student.
